back_translation: That which has existed from the beginning, that which we all have heard, that which we have seen with our own eyes, that which we have gazed-attentively at, and our own hands have touched, is the matter of the Word of life

And that life has revealed Himself appearing. We have seen and are witnesses, and we proclaim to you all about that eternal life, which originally was abiding with the Father, and has revealed Himself appearing to us
What we have seen and heard, we proclaim to you all also, so that you all may have a part-together with us. And our part-together is with the Father and with His Son, who is Jesus Christ
And we are writing these things, so that our joy may be filled-completely
And this is the message we heard from Him, and we proclaim to you all: God is the light, and in Him there is no darkness at all
If we say that we have a part-together with Him, but we walk in the darkness, we lie, and we are not practicing-according-to the truth
But if we walk in the light, just as He abides in the light, we have a part-together with one another, and the blood of Jesus His Son cleanses us from all sin
If we say that we have no sin, we deceive ourselves, and the truth is not in us
If we confess our sins, He is faithful and righteous, and will forgive our sins, and will cleanse us from all unrighteousness
If we say that we have not committed sin, we are making Him a liar, and His word is not in us
